list.name: meter
list.label: Contatore
list.query: SELECT label AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM meters WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid ORDER BY label

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, sum_value AS value, label AS metric FROM readings_15min r JOIN meters m ON m.id = r.meter_id WHERE r.tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND m.meter_type IN ('electricity','electricity_3p') AND r.bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND r.bucket < $__timeTo() AND ($meter = 'All' OR r.meter_id::text IN ($meter)) ORDER BY 1
SELECT bucket AS time, sum_value * 0.185 AS value, 'cost' AS metric FROM readings_1h WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1
SELECT SUM(sum_value) * 0.250 / 1000 AS co2_tonnes FROM readings_1h WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo()

SELECT m.label AS metric, SUM(r.sum_value) AS value FROM readings_1h r JOIN meters m ON m.id = r.meter_id WHERE r.tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND r.bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND r.bucket < $__timeTo() GROUP BY m.label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT triggered_at AS time, 1 AS value, kind AS metric FROM alerts WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND kind = 'consumption_anomaly' AND triggered_at >= $__timeFrom() AND triggered_at < $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket) BETWEEN 6 AND 13 THEN 'Mattino' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket) BETWEEN 14 AND 21 THEN 'Pomeriggio' ELSE 'Notte' END AS metric, SUM(sum_value) AS value FROM readings_1h WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1
SELECT bucket AS time, sum_value AS value FROM readings_1h WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant'::uuid AND bucket >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket < $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1
